name: kiplaa
description: Kiplaa — A fast WhatsApp bot built with Go (modern launcher v2.0)

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp Session ID — get it at https://i-tct.com/pair/qr (REQUIRED)

PREFIX.description: Command prefix symbol. Use '.' for .ping, '!' for !ping, or leave empty for no prefix.

FILTER_NOISE_LOGS.description: Hide internal/noisy log messages. Recommended: true

DB_BATCH_SIZE.description: ⚡ Records per write batch — higher = fewer disk operations (default: 600)

DB_FLUSH_INTERVAL.description: ⚡ How often to flush DB to disk in milliseconds (default: 2000)

DB_CACHE_MAX_BYTES.description: ⚡ Max RAM for DB cache in bytes. 268435456 = 256 MB (default: 268435456)

DB_BUSY_TIMEOUT_MS.description: ⚡ Timeout when DB is busy/locked in milliseconds (default: 8000)

CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME.description: Cloudinary cloud name for image hosting (optional)

OPENWEATHER_API_KEY.description: OpenWeatherMap API key — enables the .weather command (optional)

MISTRAL_API_KEY.description: Mistral AI API key — enables AI chat features (optional)
